zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Fleet於1356年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，她的父親Sir Lawrence Fleet28歲，母親Lady Lawrence Fleet25歲。她於1374年與John de Harington, Knight of Exton在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾可頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1421年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Fleet于1356年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Sir Lawrence Fleet28岁，母亲Lady Lawrence Fleet25岁。她于1374年与John de Harington, Knight of Exton在英国英格兰盧特藍德艾可頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1421年在英国英格兰薩默塞特享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fleet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Middle English flete ‘estuary, watercourse’ (Old English flēot). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived beside an estuary or watercourse, or toponymic, from a place so named, such as Fleet in Lincolnshire, Dorset, Kent, Middlesex, Hampshire or Holt Fleet, Worcestershire.
nickname for a swift runner, from Middle English flete ‘swift, rapid’.

variants.name: Flett
meanings: Scottish: probably a habitational name from a place in the parish of Delting, Shetland, named with an Old Norse term denoting a strip of arable land or pasture. On the other hand it may be from the Old Norse byname Fljótr ‘swift, speedy’. Compare Fleet 2. The surname is now most common in Banffshire and Orkney.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Fleet was born in 1356, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Lawrence Fleet, was 28 and her mother, Lady Lawrence Fleet, was 25. She married John de Harington, Knight of Exton in 1374, in Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1421, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Fleet est née en 1356, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Lawrence Fleet, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Lawrence Fleet, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John de Harington, Knight of Exton en 1374, à Exton, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1421, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Fleet 1356 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Lawrence Fleet 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Lawrence Fleet 25. Sie hat 1374 in Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom John de Harington, Knight of Exton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1421 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Fleet è nata il nel 1356 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Lawrence Fleet, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Lawrence Fleet, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John de Harington, Knight of Exton nel 1374, nel Exton, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1421, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Fleet(이)가 1356년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Lawrence Fleet(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Lawrence Fleet(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 스턴에서 John de Harington, Knight of Exton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Fleet nasceu em 1356, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Lawrence Fleet, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Lawrence Fleet, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Harington, Knight of Exton em 1374, em Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1421, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Fleet родилась в 1356 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Lawrence Fleet было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Lawrence Fleet, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Harington, Knight of Exton в 1374 г. в местности экстон, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1421 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Fleet nació en 1356, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Lawrence Fleet, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Lawrence Fleet, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John de Harington, Knight of Exton en 1374, en Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1421, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
